definition: Cash reserves liquidity credit access contingency funding insurance and budget flexibility that protect function during financial stress
measurement_note: Use cash runway liquidity coverage emergency funds credit terms insurance coverage and flexible budget authority indicators

definition: Staffing depth cross-training backup roles recovery time manageable workload and psychological safety
measurement_note: Use staffing ratios workload recovery time cross-training coverage turnover burnout and worker voice indicators

definition: Backup systems spare parts reserve capacity alternate workflows continuity plans and graceful degradation capacity
measurement_note: Use backup tests spare-parts coverage recovery time objectives continuity exercises and critical-process redundancy indicators

definition: Institutional memory documentation decision records mentoring knowledge maps and communities of practice
measurement_note: Use documentation coverage knowledge maps succession coverage after-action archives and decision-record quality indicators

definition: Alternative suppliers mutual-aid partners route options local relationships and external coordination capacity
measurement_note: Use supplier diversity mutual-aid agreements route alternatives partner readiness and dependency mapping indicators

definition: Decision space emergency authority flexible budgets adaptive rules escalation paths and accountable discretion
measurement_note: Use delegated authority emergency protocols flexible funding escalation speed review cycles and accountability indicators

definition: Capacity to prevent slack from becoming hoarding exploitation shifted burden or unequal protection
measurement_note: Use worker protection supplier fairness community impact transparency accountability and participatory review indicators

definition: Burden created by missing or poorly distributed slack including burnout supplier exploitation household precarity deferred maintenance or community harm
measurement_note: Higher values should trigger ethical review participatory redesign and burden-distribution analysis

definition: Administrative political cultural technical budget and leadership burden required to build or maintain a slack portfolio
measurement_note: Higher values should trigger sequencing feasibility governance and resource review
